description_long: This is a modern, single-story house set within a fenced yard, surrounded by a variety of trees and landscaped greenery. The house features a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular structure, with large windows on several sides allowing for ample natural light. The exterior is primarily white with some accent colors, and there is a visible outdoor patio area with seating and a small garden. The property includes a paved pathway and a driveway, suggesting vehicular access. The landscaping is thoughtfully arranged, with both open lawn space and denser clusters of foliage providing privacy and aesthetic appeal. The main entryway is clearly defined, with a sheltered porch and steps leading up to the front door.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by a fence. Features include a patio, driveway, and a mix of open lawn and dense trees.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the house from above the front yard, highlighting the main entryway, patio area, and dense tree clusters on the left and right sides.
description_view_1: View 1 presents the rear and side of the house, revealing a driveway, a more open lawn, and the back garden area with fewer trees.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the house from the opposite side, emphasizing the flat roof, side windows, and a row of palm trees along the fence.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a perspective from the backyard, showing the rear patio, open lawn, and the arrangement of trees and fencing around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large windows and vertical strips
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a flat overhang, steps, and a minimalist door, set within a sheltered porch area
